task_completion.description: Read the ROI instructions to get the coordinates for the corner regions.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing the agent opening or displaying the contents of ~/AstroImages/uniformity_check/roi_instructions.txt in a text editor or terminal.
Screenshots showing m12_Vcomb.fits opened in an astronomical image viewer (like DS9) or loaded via a script.

task_completion.description: Measure the median and standard deviation for the four corner regions.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing the agent extracting or viewing statistics (median and stddev) for the Top-Left, Top-Right, Bottom-Left, and Bottom-Right 200x200 pixel regions.

task_completion.description: Save the uniformity report with the required format and calculations.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing a text editor or terminal writing to ~/AstroImages/uniformity_check/uniformity_report.txt. The content must include the median and stddev for all 4 corners, the calculated max fractional difference, and the assessment category (UNIFORM, MARGINAL, or NON-UNIFORM).
Screenshots showing that the image viewer window displaying the FITS image has been closed in the final steps of the trajectory.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent actually measured the image statistics using a tool or script.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for interaction with an image analysis tool's statistics dialog, region properties, or a Python/shell script outputting the median and stddev, ensuring the values were not hallucinated.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent calculated the max fractional difference.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for the agent using a calculator, Python interactive shell, or script to compute '100 * (max_median - min_median) / mean_of_medians'.

integrity.description: Verify the report was saved to the exact requested path.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look at the file path in the text editor or terminal command to ensure it is exactly /home/ga/AstroImages/uniformity_check/uniformity_report.txt.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task uses a V-band FITS image of Messier 12 (NGC 6218). The ROI size for the corner checks is exactly 200x200 pixels. The final report must be saved to /home/ga/AstroImages/uniformity_check/uniformity_report.txt.
